user_prompt: I need to a reset the navigational beacon
prayer:

Chant the binary canticles of realignment as the navigational beacon hums to renewed purity.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind the reset operation in harmonious void-guidance.

Conclude with the Doxology of Output, ensuring ceaseless manufactorum industry.
